urdu transliteration text: Sakina aye Sakina
english translation text: Sakina! Oh Sakina!

urdu transliteration text:
Get up Sakina, Let’s go to Karbala!
Utho Sakina Chalein Karbala
Zindann se jab riha hue sadate karbala

Maa ne lipat k qabre sakina pe di yeh sada
Utho Sakina Chalein Karbala
english translation text: Mother hugged the grave of Sakina and cried… Get up Sakina, Let’s go to Karbala!

urdu transliteration text:
Choti si turbat pe maa ne kaha
Utho sakina chalein karbala
english translation text: On the small grave … cried the mother…Get up Sakina, Let’s go to Karbala!

urdu transliteration text:
Zindan se jata hai ab qafla
Utho Sakina Chalein Karbala
english translation text: The caravan is setting off from the prisonGet up Sakina, Let’s go to Karbala!

urdu transliteration text:
Mujhe shahzadi tumhari qasam
Na rakhun gi zindan se bahir qadam
english translation text: By You! My princess! I will not set a  foot out of this prison indeed

urdu transliteration text:
Safar ki ab hoti hai tayarian
Amari mei bethe hai ahl e haram
english translation text: Preparations to depart made … the household seated on the rides

urdu transliteration text:
Ghurbat ka mere tumhe wasta
Utho Sakina Chalein Karbala
english translation text: Have my mercy on my lonelinessGet up Sakina, Let’s go to Karbala!

urdu transliteration text:
Woh pehle k jese to ghurbat nahi
Aye bibi hamari woh halat nahi
english translation text: Ghurbat, not like it used to be … O’ Lady! We are not like we used to be!

urdu transliteration text:
Tumhe shamiyon se ab aye meri jaan
Kafan mangne ki zaroorat nahi
english translation text: My dear! There is no need for a shroud from the people of Shaam anymore

urdu transliteration text:
Lo mil gai hai tumhari rida
Utho Sakina Chalein Karbala
english translation text: Your chaadar has been returnedGet up Sakina, Let’s go to Karbala!

urdu transliteration text:
Mujhe yaad asghar ki hai babasi
Lahad se woh mayat nikali gai
english translation text: I remember Asghar’s helplessness,His body exhumed from the grave

urdu transliteration text:
Akele mei rehne na dun gi tumhe
Bharosa nahi shamio ka koi
english translation text: I will not let you stay alone,I do not trust the people of Shaam

urdu transliteration text: Rehte hai charo taraf ashqian Utho Sakina Chalein Karbala
english translation text: Tyrants are stationed on all sides,Get up Sakina! Let’s go to Karbala!

urdu transliteration text:
Yeh shami kahan tumko behlai gay
Tumhari lahad per nahi ai gay
english translation text: The people of Shaam won’t look after you,Will never visit you at your grave!

urdu transliteration text:
Rahay ga andhera hi zindan mei
Haram jab yahan se chale jai gay
english translation text: When we are gone this prison will still remain in darkness

urdu transliteration text:
Kon ai ga phir jalane diya
Utho Sakina Chalein Karbala
english translation text: Who will come to light a candle?Get up Sakina, Let’s go to Karbala!

urdu transliteration text:
Kahani padar gi sunao gi mei
Agar neend ai sulao gi mei
english translation text: I’ll tell you the story of your father,I’ll put you to bed, when you are feeling sleepy

urdu transliteration text:
Akele na naqe pe bethu gi tum
Tumhay sath apnay bithao gi mei
english translation text: You won’t mount the camel alone,I will make you sit with me!

urdu transliteration text:
Ab to rasan mei na hoga gala
Utho Sakina Chalein Karbala
english translation text: Your neck won’t be in the chains anymore,Get up Sakina, Let’s go to Karbala!

urdu transliteration text:
Mujhe maar daale ga bus yahi ghum
Qamar hai bete tumhari tukham
english translation text: This pain will kill meThis hunch of yours, my dear daughter!

urdu transliteration text:
Waram bazou ka mujhe yaad hai
Tumhe to dikhai bhi deta hai kam
english translation text: I still remember the bruises in your arms,and your eye sight is weak too

urdu transliteration text:
Akbar se bibi mile gi shifa
Utho Sakina Chalein Karbala
english translation text: From Akbar, you will get curedGet up Sakina, Let’s go to Karbala!

urdu transliteration text:
Bari dair tehri hai darbar mei
Yahan per na roko ziyada unhe
english translation text: She waited for a long time in the courtdon’t make her wait more here

urdu transliteration text:
K pehlu pe ek hath rakhe hue
Sada de rahi hai sakina tumhe
english translation text: With her hand on her side,Sakina is calling you

urdu transliteration text:
Lene ko ai hai khud sayedda
Utho Sakina Chalein Karbala
english translation text: Sayeda herself has come to take you,Get up Sakina, Let’s go to Karbala!

urdu transliteration text:
Thi zindan mei akber ajab woh ghari
Rehai pe roti thi her ek phoopi
english translation text: Akbar, It was painful time in the prisons,every aunt was crying for freedom

urdu transliteration text:
Idher khoon rota tha abid
udhar Sakina lahad mei tarapti rahi
english translation text: Here Abid cried in tears of bloodthere Sakina was disturbed in her grave

urdu transliteration text:
Jab bhi yeh madar ne ro ker kaha
Utho Sakina Chalein Karbala
english translation text: Whenever Mother cried and said:“Get up Sakina! Let’s go to Karbala”
